languages.text: "Согласно Уставу Астра Милитарум, ваше неповиновение вышестоящему командующему квалифицируется как предательство. Уверены, что хотите ими быть?"
"According to the Astra Militarum Handbook, your defiance of a superior officer qualifies as treason. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted a traitor?"
languages.original_text: "Согласно Уставу Астра Милитарум, ваше неповиновение вышестоящему командующему квалифицируется как предательство. Уверены, что хотите ими быть?"

traits.locale_text: "According to the Astra Militarum's Codex, your defiance of a superior commanding officer is classified as treachery. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted as such?"
"According to the Astra Militarum's Codex, your defiance of a superior commanding officer is classified as treachery. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted as such?"
"According to the Astra Militarum Code, your defiance of a superior officer qualifies as treason. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted a traitor?"
"According to the Astra Militarum Code, your defiance of a superior officer qualifies as treason. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted a traitor?"

languages.text: “根据《星界军手册》，违抗上级军官等同于叛变。你们想成为叛徒吗？”
languages.original_text: "According to the Astra Militarum Handbook, your defiance of a superior officer qualifies as treason. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted a traitor?"

traits.locale_text: “根据《星界军手册》，违抗上级军官等同于叛变。你们想成为叛徒吗？”

languages.text: "Astra Militarum El Kitabı'na göre üst rütbeli bir subaya karşı gelmek ihanet sayılır. Hain olarak anılmak istediğinizden emin misiniz?"
languages.original_text: "According to the Astra Militarum Handbook, your defiance of a superior officer qualifies as treason. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted a traitor?"

traits.locale_text: "Astra Militarum El Kitabı'na göre üst rütbeli bir subaya karşı gelmek ihanet sayılır. Hain olarak anılmak istediğinizden emin misiniz?"

languages.text: « D'après le Manuel de l'Astra Militarum, un soldat qui défie un officier supérieur se rend coupable de trahison. Tenez-vous vraiment à ce que l'on vous considère comme une traîtresse ? »
languages.original_text: "According to the Astra Militarum Handbook, your defiance of a superior officer qualifies as treason. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted a traitor?"

traits.locale_text: « D'après le Manuel de l'Astra Militarum, un soldat qui défie un officier supérieur se rend coupable de trahison. Tenez-vous vraiment à ce que l'on vous considère comme une traîtresse ? »

languages.text: «Según el manual del Astra Militarum, desafiar las órdenes de un oficial superior es un acto de traición. ¿De verdad quiere que se la considere una traidora?».
languages.original_text: "According to the Astra Militarum Handbook, your defiance of a superior officer qualifies as treason. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted a traitor?"

traits.locale_text: «Según el manual del Astra Militarum, desafiar las órdenes de un oficial superior es un acto de traición. ¿De verdad quiere que se la considere una traidora?».

languages.text: "Laut Handbuch des Astra Militarum gilt Eure Missachtung eines vorgesetzten Offiziers als Verrat. Seid Ihr Euch sicher, dass Ihr als Verräterin gelten wollt?"
languages.original_text: "According to the Astra Militarum Handbook, your defiance of a superior officer qualifies as treason. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted a traitor?"

traits.locale_text: "Laut Handbuch des Astra Militarum gilt Eure Missachtung eines vorgesetzten Offiziers als Verrat. Seid Ihr Euch sicher, dass Ihr als Verräterin gelten wollt?"

languages.text: 「アストラ・ミリタラム便覧によれば、上官への反抗は反逆罪に当たる。お前は本当に、反逆者と見なされたいのか？」
languages.original_text: "According to the Astra Militarum Handbook, your defiance of a superior officer qualifies as treason. Are you quite certain you wish to be counted a traitor?"

traits.locale_text: 「アストラ・ミリタラム便覧によれば、上官への反抗は反逆罪に当たる。お前は本当に、反逆者と見なされたいのか？」
